features.evidence: It's a perfect upgrade and the battery holds very well for a 3 year old phone. Note that this phone still has a lightening charger and does not have Apple Intelligence.the condition is like new, battery at 100%, no scratches anywhere- a great bang for the buck!

If you want a flagship phone experience without the flagship price tag, this version of the 14 Pro is a smart pick. I really appreciate the price for this phone, I don’t feel like I’ve spent an arm and a leg just for an upgrade.
Video quality is great too — it handles action and detail really well. Overall, the phone works perfectly: performance, camera, Face ID — everything is fine.
Right away you notice how smooth the display is. The phone really was in excellent condition, not one scratch on the screen or back.
Performance is excellent. The ProMotion screen is crisp and responsive, and everything from scrolling to gaming feels fluid.
The 128GB of storage is enough for everyday use, especially if most of your photos and videos are backed up to the cloud.
The camera system is one of my favorite aspects.
